_publications._publicationTitle: Long Noncoding RNA WT1-AS Inhibit Cell Malignancy via miR-494-3p in Glioma.

_contextSnippet: miR-494-3p significantly decreased the luciferase activity of WT1-AS-WT, but had no effect on that of WT1-AS-MUT
details: miR-494-3p significantly decreased luciferase activity of WT1-AS-WT but had no effect on WT1-AS-MUT
